display_title: Slay the Spire 2:The Legends Were True
wikitext:
{{Event Header|StS2 The Legends Were True.png}} {{E|The Legends Were True|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} that can occur in the {{2|Overgrowth}} and the {{2|Underdocks}}. == Options == {{Frame|Nab the Map}} Receive the {{TS|gold||{{C|Spoils Map||2}}}}. {{Frame|Slowly Find an Exit}} Lose {{TS|negative||8}} HP. Procure {{TS|blue||1}} random {{TS|gold||{{2|Potion}}}}. == Dialogue ==
Entering into a pitch dark chamber, a sudden light pierces the darkness
from above, just as the door slams behind you. Illuminated before you apperas to be a podium with a map on it. You feel
compelled to take it. Suspicious.
{{Frame|Nab the Map}}
What's the worst that could happen? As you grab the map, an opening
appears before you on the other side of the room.
{{Frame|Slowly Find an Exit}}
As you sneak around the dark, looking for a way out the room
violently shake. With a sudden crash, the entire chamber collapses on
you. Barely making it out of the rubble, you find a vial of something useful that
must have been hidden in the room.
[[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
